item.title: Wholesome Wednesday dump of smile crepes (that's a European pancake)
item.description:
1. Yeah, son... that's me in my youth. :D But seriously, shout out to dads that are heroes to their kids.
2. Kindness goes a long way
3. : )
4. I honestly prefer this to a 500$ Gucci
5. Make them feel unique : )
6. A daughter taking a photo of her father, who graduated
7
8. Damn, it looks so comfy
9. Never forget that ;)
10. First day on the job
11. I'm so pretty
12. Reporter gets interrupted... by his mom
13
14. That's ma duck
15. When someone is kind and actually appreciates my passion (instead of viewing it as a waste of time) Thanks for scrolling all the way trough! Hope this dump made you happy! Finally I would like to share with you a little passion project of mine. Me and my brother are making a game that is inspired by "The Stanley Parable" and the narrator definitely has a touch of GladOS to him. The game was part of Next Fest 2024 and it would меан the world to us if you wishlisted: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ P.S. HAVE A GREAT REST OF THE WEEK!
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

Jim Jefferies
Matthew Broussard
Steve Hofstetter
Bill Maher
Taylor Tomlinson
loic suberville
Justin Smith
Troy Bond
Matthew Broussard
Robin Williams - But I was tempted to put Will Ferrell just to see how many people I could piss off.
Matt O'Brien
Emily Catalano
Adam Newman
item.dc:creator: bobthefunny

item.title: Missed my chance
item.description: Hey random internet person. You made a post here today. You were looking for a reason to live. I opened it, tried to figure out what to say in the comments, got distracted and closed it. That was several hours ago, there's no way I'm gonna track down a solitary post on here, but I thought of what I needed to say. I'll be the reason. I'm just a random guy, we've never met and almost certainly never will. But if I can be a reason for someone to get up tomorrow and give life another go, then that's what I'm gonna do. Just an offer, no pressure to take me up on it. And it's just as well if you do it for a cat or a flower or a song. See ya tomorrow?
item.dc:creator: We11thatwasC00L

item.dc:creator: shenanigansen

item.title: if you build it, they will come
item.description:
June of last year I decided to pursue a lifelong dream. I quit my job with not backup/next job lined up! No, I quit my job to try building my own business.
The great thing was, my boss was super encouraging. He'd always say things like "you should be better than this with all your experience" or "you took too long on this project". or "I'm shocked you didn't include me in the decision making on this, I thought we were a team" (micromanaging small tiny shit)
So we bought this property 2 years ago. Did not realize at the time the shop walls were rotted right out
jacking to replace wood studs/sills
mice rate this hotel 5/5 stars
spray foam quote came back at 30k CAD. Used roofing insulation and the spray foam kits you get at home depot, closer to 10k.
mmmmmmmmould. Respirator for sure
found a early 1990's mining tag in the walls
trenching for water flow
frost barrier
the first concrete pad I've ever poured.
3 skids of concrete. Did it solo. Did every single job on this reno solo.
I added in some cross bracing. There's not a square wall in this shop. The cross bracing is overkill. I know.
2x4 rafters got sistered to something more substantial
poor man's spray foam. Cut, insert, foam the gaps. Takes FOREVER
sprayed everything with DC315, fire resistant intumescent paint. Inside the walls too.
reclaimed roofing panels
note for next guy
I bought a Brown and Bogg's metal shear. 1950's-1960's? not sure! Equipment is a anywhere from 1/4 to a 10th of new price. Why?, nobody's getting into the trades.
my Giraffe! I mean, smoke eater.
a nice 1" top table I picked up for half material costs.
Starting to get worried here. Did I do all this for nothing? Am I going to have to get a day job? The bank ain't worried, in fact they are quite happy with my spending habits at this point.
Receiving area. I'm pretty happy with the power lines you see on that back wall.
the white box on the wall, or the kill box as Imgur would describe it, https://imgur.com/gallery/sHxKps5
made some firepits for fun
not one sold yet. Hah. It is pretty cold out. We got snow the other day still.
oh fart.
had to install a sump pump out front to battle spring melt/heavy rain/stupidly sloped driveway that slopes towards the shop.
animal resistant garbage bin. Aced it. No profit left in the job though. Next. Also done with products at this point.
A little snowmobile repair. Track was snapped in two
sketchup to table
they are overland racks for a truck. Dudes mounting a tent ontop
got a little trailer repair
got some boat work. Window frame and winch post repair
started on some art! https://imgur.com/gallery/8GwQpof
Dog tax. He's working hard too.
item.dc:creator: Islapbees

item.title: So somehow I was able to download this so I can repost it so it works again in my favorites
item.description: Why do my memes disappear. I have read your comments. Up until me posting this, I was unaware the man in the video was such an asshole. I'm sorry, and I won't mention or support this person's work moving forward.
item.dc:creator: zeacorzeppelin10

item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Like and share if you believe in second chances <3 <3
item.dc:creator: stanleyspadowski

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1147 (magical dimetrodon)
item.description:
Ugh. It is morning. I am awake. I was having a lovely dream where I was watching an epic, imax-filmed, lovingly animated version of Terry Pratchett's "The Last Hero." Anyways. Bread. Let's get it.
Bird. But yeah, same gremlin energy.
Hey look, it's another Meme that attacks @sisipherr mercilessly. But also this is a mood for me, too. Fuck you, Tamarisk. Fuck you, Bermuda grass.
At least no more oracle bone turtles.
Mood.
I actually think I know who this priest is; I think I went to seminary with this dude. Well, insofar as I can recognize someone by their head.
Accurate. Today's album is Roots and Sprouts, again.
I discovered a new fruit at the store Saturday night: Cherimoya. So I splurged and bought some.
I liked the flavor, but wasn't crazy about the texture, so I was trying to figure out what to do with the other ones I bought. I discovered that some botanist by the name of Berthold Seemann described it as one of the three most sublime fruits in the world, alongside Pineapples and Mangosteen. So now I have to do the obvious and make a mead with all three and call it "Seemann's Elixir" just for the joke. Ordered some Mangosteen juice and dried Mangosteen fruit and picked up some pineapple. Haven't decided what honey to use yet, though. Prepped the pineapple and the rest of the Cherimoya and threw everything in the freezer.
Proper "Viking" helmet styles. Or Anglo-saxon ones.
And trying to remember what grammar goes where is frustrating me to try new languages in great depth
When my buddy Gary and I were down in SE AZ and trapped this is always how we greeted each other.
Oops.
Me on Monday.
(I actually learned a lot from my foray into Buddhism. I just found the idea of Ron Swanson as Orthodox to be absolutely hilarious for some reason.)
Yeah, but how long did your empires last? Yeah, I thought so.
Poor Allosaurus.
Come on, Ireland, make Star Trek real.
Any of the four hadrosaurs from deposits in Baja California.
You heard me, Ireland. Unify. Make star trek real.
the Sauropod Camelotia on a quest
Penguins are true aquatic dinosaurs.
That last one hits hardest.
Mood.
@DataDewDrop and I had a midnight conversation about Synapsids vs. Diapsids and this lead, to a madcap scenario where Diogenes of Sinope brings a Dimetrodon into Plato's Academy and proclaims, "Look, a mammal..." which then subsequently changes the face of Philosophy forever when it promptly eats Aristotle. To the point where Mohammad flies on two magical embracing Dimetrodons in his Night Ride from Jerusalem. ...which THEN lead to me saying "it's a magical Dimetrodon, Charlie." And so @DataDewDrop made this meme. I was sober at the time too, just very sleep-deprived. Imagine me sleep-deprived and on Alcohol.
It really does.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Hi Pippin! He's a pretty boy. Okay."
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: To this day
item.description: The moment I (autistic) saw this, I shared it with my also autistic husband. ANY time something went against plans, that's how one of us would respond to register our understanding on an au level (IYKYK). He died a few months ago. I still mentally respond with "my wife" to myself when encountering painful losses others have. But I feel like I have no one who groks that with me. This is Imgur, SURELY I'm wrong about that (and don't call me Shirley). (originally posted by @StrangePaegan on 2023-03-28 08:17:20)
item.dc:creator: ThisTimeLastYear

item.title: A pose a day: Queen Amethyst Reaching Back
item.description: Hi! I'm AdorkaStock. I photograph myself and others in various poses for art reference. My goal is to include in my galleries of stock poses a variety of body types, skin types, and people doing various things so there is a piece of stock for everyone. I want to share my stock, which is free to use for reference, with as many people as possible in case they need it! FAQ is in my bio. Hope this pose helps you! Happy drawing! Heeeey FP~! thanks for the love. If you want to support what I do you can check out the stuff I have available in my kofi shop like my Wing Pack (https://ko-fi.com/s/053207033d) which includes 75 full body pose reference photos featuring three models: Sarah/AdorkaStock (white female), Queen Amethyst (Black female) and Prince Tico (Latino male) each wearing 65" feathered wings in various poses. ty again for the support! #Art #AdorkaStock #Reference #Artist User tags: @HaikuSorrow @Brestaris @The9mm @Veraatje01 @thegraphiteknight @CanOnlySayYes @SmolTenk @5GFPLaqZ4nAy2QwrqOEI @Nautas @LadyAzzura @Noooooozzzzzzzz @BeanTootsAreBest @pumpkinknight @sniggly5212 @TheMemeForge @lgwingnut @Talon83 @KootchieKoo @roeliebobs @TheDizzyToast @pangalgargblast @IndianCowboy @cojamist @BobbyBobbston @BenderRodriguz1010 @Netcat @ScurvyMI @BrutalAnalSeepage @AlmostPerfectComment @CouldntCakeLess @Hedgehoglet @iDrawStuff @PprHrt @Genuphobatastic @brandopolaf @TorisArt @Wormwoodworms @HikariShade @Like2Fox @ICGer @whitegirlcanteven
item.dc:creator: adorkastock

item.title: I made a cardigan!
item.description: I bought the yarn back in 2018, made a jumper I hated, ripped it out, started this cardigan… and then abandoned it for 3 years. Feels great to have finally finished it! #handmade #knitting
item.dc:creator: Ammety

item.title: Shitty and dated meme dump
item.description:
I had these in a folder titled "Fuuniest"
I could wait for your dozen red roses, or I could have these dandelions right now. Turns out I'm a sucker for dandelions.
I keep trying to delete this because it's so childish.... But I still giggle every time I reread it
item.dc:creator: Eatsleeprun
